title: qubit: Beyond the Dense Ceiling — VRAM-Resident Tiered Compression for Quantum Circuit Simulation on Consumer GPUs
description: A GPU quantum circuit simulator whose state vector is partitioned into blocks stored in one of three tiers (ZERO / block-scaled int16 COMPRESSED / complex64 FULL), resident entirely in VRAM. An a-priori L2 fidelity budget bounds compression error by construction; an automatic planner routes each circuit to the cheapest of dense, entanglement-factorized, and tiered-block backends from static analysis. Runs quantum circuits beyond the dense qubit ceiling of a 6 GB consumer GPU (31-qubit GHZ exactly in 1 MB; 29-qubit dense circuits at measured fidelity 0.9998), natively on Windows.
